summary_zh: Every 33 cards drawn by ALL players, deal 66 damage to a random enemy.
mechanics_zh: Every 33 cards drawn by ALL players, deal 66 damage to a random enemy.。

upgrade.summary_zh: 升级后：Every 33 cards drawn by ALL players, deal 99 damage to a random enemy.
changes_zh: 效果从 [Every 33 cards drawn by ALL players, deal 66 damage to a random enemy.] 变为 [Every 33 cards drawn by ALL players, deal 99 damage to a random enemy.]。
